argus.description: ARGUS MCP — HTTP-клиент к backend /api/v1: create_scan (ScanCreateRequest: target, email, scan_mode, nested options), intelligent_smart_scan (ScanSmartCreateRequest), skill scan, findings/reports/intelligence/sandbox, Kali registry + KAL runners. Admin: GET /cache/stats, GET /cache/health, POST /cache/warm, DELETE /cache (flush_cache, confirm + argus: patterns) через ARGUS_ADMIN_KEY. Knowledge: GET /api/v1/knowledge/strategy (get_knowledge_strategy).
